title: Floral Chewy Slovak Leek Soup
description: A comforting, Mediterranean-friendly Slovak leek soup that bursts with floral aroma and chewy pearl barley, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and leeks; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, dried oregano, and thyme; cook another minute until fragrant.
Add bay leaf, pearl barley, and diced tomatoes; stir to combine.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 35 minutes, or until barley is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste; add optional rose water now if desired.
Remove pot from heat and let the soup sit, covered, for 5 minutes to mellow flavors.
Ladle soup into bowls, ensuring each receives a good portion of barley and leeks.
Garnish with freshly chopped parsley and a drizzle of extra-virgin olive oil if desired.
Serve hot, accompanied by crusty bread for a complete Slovakian meal.
